name: Anfu CE LINK Limited
summary: Anfu CE LINK Limited manufacturers and sells custom-made Cables and accessories for AV, PC, and mobile applications in Mainland China. The company offers a range of cables and adapters, and smart wireless accessories, as well as power related products, including USB power stations power banks travel and car chargers, wireless charging products, and inverters. It also provides AV distribution products, such as HDMI matrix, switcher, splitter, converter, and extender products; HDBaseT and AV/USB extenders; and AV matrix, switcher, splitter/hub, and converter products. The company is based in Ji'an, China.
